---
title: "dh essais"
description: |
  forward to digital humanities recent relevant learnings overview at dahlem center for linguistics project page proposal (sample project view)
date: "2026-05-08"
categories:
  - programming
  - linguistics
  - AVL
  - webdesign
  - archiving
  - language
image: featured.png
image-alt: "mermaid diagram of dc-lx workflow"
number-sections: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
     <style>
     .fadenlogo {
        display: inline-block;
        aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
        height: 1em;
        margin-bottom: -0.15em;
        mask-image: url('../../assets/images/fadenlogo-fwb.svg');
        mask-size: contain;
        mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        mask-position: center;
        background-color: currentColor;
        vertical-align: baseline;
      }
      </style>
fadenlogo: '[]{.fadenlogo title="rotefaden Logo" aria-label="rotefaden Logo"}'
# alt-text:
#   extension-browser-1: |
#     The extension browser interface showing extension type filters with options for Shortcodes, Filters, Formats, Reveal.js Plugins, and Projects.
#   extension-selection: |
#     The QuickPick dialog showing a list of discovered extensions with checkboxes for multi-selection when installing from a repository containing multiple extensions.
#   template-files: |
#     The QuickPick dialog showing available template files to copy with checkboxes for selective file installation.
#   version-validation: |
#     The warning dialog indicating that the extension version requirement is not met, showing the required and current Quarto versions with options to Install Anyway or Cancel.
#   github-token: |
#     The input dialog for entering a GitHub personal access token for private repository access.
---

![](featured.png){
  .img-featured
  .img-fluid
  fig-align="center"
  fig-alt='{{< meta image-alt >}}'
  width="600px"
}

**{{< meta fadenlogo >}} FWB** redirect...

:::: {.highlight}

**{{< meta fadenlogo >}} FWB** > go now to [recent relevant learnings](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/blog/).
:::

::: {.callout-note}
you will be redirected...
:::
